programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A man unleashes a tirade at a female motorist after a rear-end collision in Florida. A worker servicing a stoplight over a road gets nailed by a semi in Louisiana. programme.desc: A Bronx driver gets a heavy dose of instant karma; a woman in Long Beach, Calif., finds herself in a standoff against an entire parking lot in an attempt to hold an empty spot; an allegedly stolen Maserati leads to a tragic end.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In a Rhode Island drive-through, a family is horrified as an enraged woman appears to stab their vehicle; an off-duty officer in Alabama is run down outside his home by a stranger's SUV.

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.title: Castle
